tweet.text: RT @TarzanSUP: Stoked to have this awesome shot of Laird gracing the front window at TARSAN II. The entire TARSAN SUP… http://t.co/Q9UqbZpV…
I think my teammate Doug Murray and my buddy @michaelstrahan have a lot to talk about... #gaptoothsmile #brickhouse http://t.co/SjKFM2Qc6e
Where did the skate hit you weezy? http://t.co/iTgtpNDv6W
